name: Linie
description: Linie is a Demon working under [Aura](https://anilist.co/character/219110/Aura). Under Aura's instruction, she was sent to assist [Lügner](https://anilist.co/character/316985/Lgner) alongside [Draht](https://anilist.co/character/316987/Draht) to perform negotiations with [Graf Granat](https://anilist.co/character/318147/Granat-Hakushaku).
